entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop, specifically L. subsp. fastigiata Waldron, used for oilseed production

entities.name: ICGV 86590
entities.description: A peanut cultivar released in 1991 for rainy-season cultivation in peninsular India

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: An agricultural trait measuring the productivity of peanut pods

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: A popular peanut cultivar in peninsular India used as a benchmark for yield comparison

entities.name: CO 2
entities.description: A local peanut cultivar compared against ICGV 86590

entities.name: TMV 2
entities.description: A local peanut cultivar compared against ICGV 86590

entities.name: KRG 1
entities.description: A local peanut cultivar compared against ICGV 86590

entities.name: TG 3
entities.description: A local peanut cultivar compared against ICGV 86590

entities.name: PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where ICGV 86590 was released for cultivation

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the peanut cultivar was tested and released

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A serious fungal disease affecting peanut crops in peninsular India

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal organism that causes rust disease in peanuts

entities.name: LATE LEAFSPOT
entities.description: A serious fungal disease affecting peanut crops in peninsular India

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal organism that causes late leafspot disease in peanuts

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where ICGV 86590 was bred

entities.name: X 14-4-B-19-B
entities.description: A Spanish breeding line used as one of the parents in the cross to create ICGV 86590

entities.name: PI 259747
entities.description: A Valencia germplasm line used as a parent for ICGV 86590, known for disease resistance

entities.name: MASS PEDIGREE METHOD
entities.description: The breeding method involving bulking resistant plants over successive generations

entities.name: RAINY-SEASON
entities.description: The specific climatic condition or season for the cultivation of ICGV 86590

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of being able to withstand rust disease, found in PI 259747

entities.name: LATE LEAFSPOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of being able to withstand late leafspot disease, found in PI 259747
